creator: paul_leil@hotmail.com
text:
Redmine 2.x works with RubyGems 1.8, which was the original reason for marking Redmine port as broken. 
Can it please be unmarked and updated to the latest version? We've been stuck on version 1.2 because of that.
Thank you.

How-To-Repeat: try upgrading the ports - redmine port is marked as broken
